critical.details: Page 2+ canonical to page 1 instead of self
critical.action: Each page should self-canonical; use rel=next/prev for pagination

critical.details: Homepage LCP: 3.2s (target <2.5s). Hero image unoptimized, blocking JS
critical.action: Optimize hero image (WebP, proper sizing), defer non-critical JS, add preload hints

critical.details: CLS: 0.15 (target <0.1). Dynamic content injection causing shifts
critical.action: Reserve space for dynamic content, use aspect-ratio for images
Convert to WebP/AVIF, implement responsive images, lazy loading

critical.details: Filter sidebar causes horizontal scroll on <375px screens
critical.action: Make filter sidebar collapsible or responsive

critical.details: Many URLs missing lastmod or have stale dates
critical.action: Add accurate lastmod on content update

critical.details: Category and paginated pages missing self-referencing canonicals
critical.action: Add <link rel="canonical" href="self-url"> to all pages

critical.details: Page 2+ canonical to page 1 instead of self
critical.action: Each page should self-canonical; use rel=next/prev for pagination

critical.details: 3 tag archive pages with zero content

high.action: Add self-referencing canonical to all pages

high.details: Filter/sort URLs should canonical to clean version
high.action: Canonical filter URLs to base category URL
Update redirects to point directly to final destination
